languages.text: "Похвальное отношение к рестриктивным догмам и прилежный подход к инфоврачевательству, коллега. Увы, сложившаяся диспозиция такова, что вашего пациента придется потревожить. Но — с великим бережением".

"A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."
languages.original_text: "Похвальное отношение к рестриктивным догмам и прилежный подход к инфоврачевательству, коллега. Увы, сложившаяся диспозиция такова, что вашего пациента придется потревожить. Но — с великим бережением".

traits.locale_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

"A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

"A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

languages.text: «Es una actitud encomiable respecto a las restricciones del dogma y un enfoque diligente de la sanación de datos, mi estimado colega. Sin embargo, las circunstancias actuales exigen que se perturbe a su paciente, aunque tendré el mayor de los cuidados al hacerlo».
languages.original_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

traits.locale_text: «Es una actitud encomiable respecto a las restricciones del dogma y un enfoque diligente de la sanación de datos, mi estimado colega. Sin embargo, las circunstancias actuales exigen que se perturbe a su paciente, aunque tendré el mayor de los cuidados al hacerlo».

languages.text: “同僚，你对限制性教条的态度值得称赞，在数据修复时也很勤勉。可惜目前形势如此，必须对你的病人进行干预。但此操作将以最高精度执行。”
languages.original_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

traits.locale_text: “同僚，你对限制性教条的态度值得称赞，在数据修复时也很勤勉。可惜目前形势如此，必须对你的病人进行干预。但此操作将以最高精度执行。”

languages.text: « C'est une attitude louable vis-à-vis du dogme restrictif et une approche diligente du soin des données. Hélas, en raison des circonstances actuelles, une ingérence sera nécessaire. Mais ce sera fait avec le plus grand soin. »
languages.original_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

traits.locale_text: « C'est une attitude louable vis-à-vis du dogme restrictif et une approche diligente du soin des données. Hélas, en raison des circonstances actuelles, une ingérence sera nécessaire. Mais ce sera fait avec le plus grand soin. »

languages.text: "Kısıtlayıcı dogmalara karşı takdire şayan bir tutum ve veri iyileştirmeye özenli bir yaklaşım meslektaşım. Ne yazık ki mevcut koşulların gidişatı, hastanın rahatsız edilmesini gerektiriyor. Azami dikkatle."
languages.original_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

traits.locale_text: "Kısıtlayıcı dogmalara karşı takdire şayan bir tutum ve veri iyileştirmeye özenli bir yaklaşım meslektaşım. Ne yazık ki mevcut koşulların gidişatı, hastanın rahatsız edilmesini gerektiriyor. Azami dikkatle."

languages.text: 「制限的な教義に対する称賛すべき姿勢、そしてデータ治癒への勤勉な取り組みですね、同僚殿。しかし残念ながら、現状の状況の配置からして、あなたの患者には手を煩わせざるを得ません。ただし、最大限の慎重さをもって」
languages.original_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

traits.locale_text: 「制限的な教義に対する称賛すべき姿勢、そしてデータ治癒への勤勉な取り組みですね、同僚殿。しかし残念ながら、現状の状況の配置からして、あなたの患者には手を煩わせざるを得ません。ただし、最大限の慎重さをもって」

languages.text: "Eine lobenswerte Einstellung zu restriktiven Dogmen und ein gewissenhafter Ansatz der Datenheilung, Kollege. Leider erfordern die aktuellen Umstände, dass Euer Patient gestört werden muss. Allerdings mit größter Vorsicht."
languages.original_text: "A commendable attitude to restrictive dogma and a diligent approach to datahealing, colleague. Alas, the current disposition of circumstances is such that your patient will have to be disturbed. But with the greatest of care."

traits.locale_text: "Eine lobenswerte Einstellung zu restriktiven Dogmen und ein gewissenhafter Ansatz der Datenheilung, Kollege. Leider erfordern die aktuellen Umstände, dass Euer Patient gestört werden muss. Allerdings mit größter Vorsicht."
